title: Zora API Vocabulary
description: Domain vocabulary and key terms for the Zora NFT Protocol and Coins REST API

terms.definition: An ERC-20 creator monetization token minted on the Zora protocol that trades on a bonding curve, allowing fans and collectors to speculate on and support creator content.
Non-Fungible Token — a unique blockchain-based digital asset representing ownership of a specific item, artwork, or collectible under ERC-721 or ERC-1155 standards.
Ethereum token standard for non-fungible tokens where each token is unique and indivisible.
Ethereum multi-token standard that supports both fungible and non-fungible tokens in a single contract, enabling batch transfers and reduced gas costs.
An OP Stack Layer 2 rollup built on Ethereum with Chain ID 7777777, optimized for NFT minting and creator transactions with lower fees.
The open-source modular blockchain framework developed by Optimism used to build Layer 2 networks like Zora Network, Base, and Optimism mainnet.
The act of creating a new NFT token on-chain by calling a smart contract's mint function, recording ownership on the blockchain.
A gasless off-chain signature-based reservation of a future NFT mint on Zora, allowing creators to pre-authorize tokens before paying gas.
An automated market-making mechanism used by Zora Coins where the price of a coin increases as more coins are purchased, creating a continuous pricing function.
A smart contract address grouping multiple NFTs under a single creator or project, either ERC-721 (unique items) or ERC-1155 (editions).
A percentage of secondary sale proceeds automatically paid to the original creator on each resale, encoded in the smart contract.
The HTTP request header used to authenticate against the Zora GraphQL NFT API. Obtain a key at keys.api.zora.co to unlock higher rate limits.
The HTTP request header used to authenticate against the Zora Coins SDK REST API.
Query language and runtime used by the Zora NFT API allowing clients to request exactly the data fields needed for collections, tokens, and events.
The component of the Zora Protocol SDK enabling creators to deploy and manage ERC-1155/ERC-721 contracts and configure minting settings.
The component of the Zora Protocol SDK enabling collectors to mint tokens, including both on-chain and gasless premint flows.
The API data model representing a Zora Coin (ERC-20 creator token), including metadata, market cap, price, holder count, and creator information.
Discovery endpoint returning curated or algorithmically ranked lists of Zora Coins including new, trending, and top-gaining coins.
A Zora user account entity containing wallet address, display name, bio, avatar, social handles (Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, Farcaster), and linked coin holdings.
An on-chain transaction event in which a Zora Coin is bought or sold, recorded with price, amount, trader address, and timestamp.
